objective: Continue the grandfathered R08B branch under V2.4, close every mandatory pre-cut readiness gap before selecting a candidate, and cut only the later green post-squash merge subject with immutable release and evidence path manifests.
executable_blocker: The V2.3 envelope incorrectly preselected 25ae9a5 as candidate and prohibited the V2.4 pre-cut config, route, provider and source readiness work required before any candidate may exist.

release config policy catalogs provider profiles dependency lock notices SBOM and inventory

stop_conditions: first pushed branch commit contains any path other than the two additive amendment files

rollback: Before candidate cut, remove only unfinished R08B changes while preserving the grandfathered draft and both already-pushed amendments; after a pushed candidate receipt, supersede additively and never rewrite history. Delete only plan-owned isolated artifacts after evidence sealing.
preservation_contract: the original V2.3 envelope and lease remain byte-identical historical objects
